questionHtml: Explain why for any transition state diagram the sum of the out degrees of the directed edges from a vertex (state) must add up to +1.
markschemeHtml:
You must leave the state along one of the edges directed out of the vertex.   R1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Explain why for any transition state diagram the sum of the out degrees of the directed edges from a vertex (state) must add up to +1.
